title: AutoFish
description: AutoFish Mod, That Has A Timer And Displays Your Catches!
body:
## 🎣 About AutoFishX

AutoFishX is a Fabric mod that automatically fishes for you — perfect for chill players who love collecting enchanted books, name tags, or rare treasures without constant clicking.

‎ ‎ 
‎ 

### ⚙️ Features
### 

  🕒 Fishing Timer – Displays how long you’ve been fishing.



  🎣 AutoFish System – Automatically casts and catches fish for you.



  💬 Catch Messages – Shows all your catches (including enchantments) in the chat.



  ⚡ Lightweight – Works on both singleplayer and servers (if allowed).


‎ 
‎ 



Bugs Or Issues May Happen, Will Fix Them Soon!
